# India Visa Experts

> Independent India visa and immigration consulting for foreign nationals, companies, and their families. We are an advisory service and are NOT affiliated with the Government of India, the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), the FRRO, or any government agency. Visa decisions rest solely with the relevant government authorities.

India Visa Experts guides international travellers and businesses through India's visa and immigration process — application strategy, document review, FRRO registration, stay extensions, and ongoing compliance. Based in Gurgaon (Gurugram), Haryana, India, serving clients of 60+ nationalities.

## Services

- [Business Visa](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/business-visa-india): For executives, investors, and entrepreneurs visiting India for meetings, conferences, and business exploration.
- [Employment Visa](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/employment-visa-india): For foreign nationals taking up paid employment with an Indian company, including inter-company transfers.
- [X Visa (Dependent)](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/x-visa-india): For spouses and dependent children of foreign nationals holding qualifying Indian visas.
- [FRRO Registration](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/frro-registration-india): Mandatory registration for foreign nationals staying in India beyond 180 days.
- [Visa Extension](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/visa-extension-india): Extending an authorized stay in India through the FRRO / e-FRRO.
- [OCI & Entry Visa](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/oci-services-india): OCI card applications and Entry Visa services for persons of Indian origin and their families.
- [Foreign Company Advisory](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/foreign-company-india-advisory): Immigration and compliance support for foreign companies and their HR teams operating in India.
- [Medical Tourism](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/medical-visa-india): e-Medical Visa, Medical Attendant Visa, and AYUSH Visa support for international patients seeking treatment at India's NABH/JCI-accredited hospitals.

## Tools & Guides

- [India Visa Finder](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/india-visa-finder): Pick your purpose of visit and get the right India visa, with a link to apply.
- [FRRO Registration Deadline Calculator](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/frro-registration-deadline-calculator): Enter an arrival date to find the FRRO registration deadline (14 days from arrival).
- [India Visa Types Compared](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/india-visa-types): Side-by-side comparison of Business, Employment, X, Medical and OCI visas.
- [India Visa & Tourism Statistics](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/india-immigration-statistics): Official Government of India foreign-arrival and e-Visa figures, with sources.
- [India Visa & Immigration FAQ](https://www.indiavisaexperts.com/faq): Answers on visas, FRRO, extensions, dependents and compliance.
